dataList.dlg: ... I've already waited way past what anyone oughta put up with. And right when I thought I was finally getting my ass outta this goddamn cold, what happens? My Ticket turns into blank scrap paper, all because of that mongrel brat! Ha... Haha... Gimme a fucking break.
Nngh... My fucking head's killin' me... A few bottles of vodka and I feel like I'm gonna puke my fuckin' guts out. *cough* Hey, Heathcliff! Get me some hair of the dog, stat!

Heathcliff! Ya half-assin' that drill I gave ya—Well, shit. You're actually doing it right. That's it~ Keep it up. It's pointless to question and think. Just do exactly as I taught ya. I gotta swing by Central for a bit. Table better be squeaky clean by the time I'm back, ya hear me? And go grab yourself something to eat in the meantime.

... Fuck me, already showin' bottom? *exhale* Heathcliff, get your ass over to the shelf and get me anothe—The hell? Where the fuck did that little mutt crawl off to? Hey, Heathcliff!! <color=#8c63c2>You called for me, Master?</color> Whaddaya think, dipshit?! Ya heard a ghost screamin' your name or something?! <color=#8c63c2>My sincerest apologies.</color> Tsk. Tighten the fuck up! Next time I call, you'll wanna show up right that second, or I'll... Capisce? <color=#8c63c2>Yes, ma'am.</color>

Frickin' hell... After all that I went through teaching Ticket, I gotta start over from baby steps with her little brat?! This is bullshit! 
*puff* That Consigliere bitch from Central hasn't said jack shit yet... And that brick-headed nutjob Yi Sang says there's no problem, either... Tsk. Fine. Guess I should get started, then.

Yoshihide's severed more than a few things on the run, hasn't she? The price she paid's just too damn huge for her to give up that Relic—the Tiansha Star's Blade.
... Tsk. Well, havin' at least one Textbook prepped for her ain't a bad call. For all I know, she might've picked up some fuck-knows-what swordfighting style while she was gone—or got her education all messed up with nobody around to beat the proper stance into her.

Once this shitshow is over, I'm gonna get that central Consigliere bitch to give me something for the trouble. Every last rotten bit of bullshit I'm eatin' out here better be worth a damn.
First, I'll get myself reinstated, and get those bastards to cough up some cash to fix my half-crippled Ticket... And hell, Textbook can already hold his own sorry ass pretty well—might as well slap a Capo title on him... Yup, not a bad picture.

Yoshihide, all I gotta do is see that you're completed, and I can get it all back... My rank, tossed down the shitter... All those years wasted rotting in this filthy cesspool... And my Ticket, busted and dragging herself around like some half-dead corpse! I'll fix it all! It'll all be worth it in the end!

Whacked a few Nursefathers? Thinkin' you're hot shit now, are ya? ... Too bad, I'm not them. I'm not one of those washed-up morons! Ha... Haha! I'm Rodion. Rodion, the War Hero of Famiglia Bognatelli! I'm the motherfucker who lopped that ugly head off the Lord of Flies and lived to raise a glass to it! You? You're just some piece-of-shit brat—that pencil neck'll be hella lot easier to chop off!
... Tsk. Great. Not a single damn idiot left to call over for a drink... Bunch of weak-ass pushovers. Got chewed up by those disgusting bugs and died like trash.

Haha... Do you even have any idea who you forgot... what you threw away to get this far?
From the first day her baby hands held a sword, all the way to the day she brought you here, I... You got any idea how I honed that Ticket of mine, day after day...? Ungrateful little bitch, how dare you forget my Ticket!
Sonuvabitch... Think I'm some fuckin' pushover? C'mon, bring it on. Should've brought a Color Fixer if ya wanted the slightest bit of chance to survive this, you miserable cocksuckers...
Keep those eyes wide open and watch.
Fall back—you're gettin' in the way. Tsk. I just can't with greenhorns who haven't had a taste of the War...
Feelin' confident? Then parry this, asshole.
Ya know, you're one tap away from bitin' it.
You've gotta be fucking kidding me...
Hah! Next!
... I... How could I... lose...? What... the fu...
*scoff* This is what you needed me for? Get Textbook to run your errands next time.
Fuck if I know... Do I have to bother knowing shit like this...?

... So this is the "Blade" the Fingers were clamorin' for? All this time, we busted our asses just for some fuckin' landfill? Hah, what a sick joke... And it doesn't even have a punchline. Hey, Heathcliff—on your feet, don't be a bitch! I'm callin' up Central. Ya go check which of the poor motherfuckers bought the farm.
... What, surprised? Told ya, didn't I? I don't lose duels. Never have, never will.
You... you little...! Heathcliff... You... You dare betray me, after everything...? Gah...
